currentStageTitle: Stage 5e — Blood Pact accusation heuristic (R3 wave + re-baseline + pre-5e cleanup all DONE)
nextAction: R3 BUILD WAVE + both-modes re-baseline + a complete game review + the pre-5e cleanup are ALL DONE. The R3 mechanics (Forge tolls / Sealed-Pledge+gambit-fix / Herald+stance) are locked; see tuning-log §tolls/§sealed/§herald/§R and memory iron-ashes-review-findings. PRE-5e CLEANUP (this commit): fixed the gambit §9 reporting trap (report.ts §9 check + tuningLoss now judge the GAMBLER-FREE fire rate, not the always-FAIL all-matchups one); re-stated the structurally-capped rescue band (2-4 → 0.5-4, labeled 'capped ~1 pooled'); fixed the oath-while-Broken gap (checkBrokenState now dissolves a player's oath when they break — no dividend leak / no raid-shield by a downed ally); reconciled the design docs to the locked game (ALGORITHM §12 delta-pointer + §9.1 refreshed numbers + §0 pledge-reversal note; ROADMAP §0 de-fossilized + §2 amended; state.json byte-identical-scope gotcha + refreshed openRisks). ALL FOUR §9 dashboard bands now PASS HONESTLY, 2-seed stable: SK-win 19.7/19.5%, rounds 12.2, gambit-free 17.3/18.8%, rescues 0.71/0.72 (vs the re-stated band); guards PASS; oaths/tolls/DK/heralds all live; 406 tests. **NEXT = Stage 5e (Blood Pact accusation): fix chooseAccusation heuristic + ACCUSATION knobs → traitor win 8.8%→12-20, exposure 87%→40-70, keep accuracy >=45% (54%) + <=2.5 accusations/game (1.6). Then 5f (final 2-seed lock + fold ALGORITHM §12 into §§1-11 prose + §9 doc).** Open design calls for the user (logged, non-blocking): the rescue cap (accept ~1 vs the don't-end-on-all-broken change), the oath/rescue-debt overlap (merge vs keep), per-count monotonicity, and whether the sealed-pledge human dilemma is worth keeping as unvalidated.
specRefs: PLAN: ~/.claude/plans/i-want-to-use-transient-quill.md (R3 build wave, all 3 stages done) + docs/handoff/stage5-tuning-log.md §tolls/§sealed/§herald

Stage H (done): src/v2/types.ts (PlayerState handLimit/stance/combatPenalty), src/v2/setup.ts (init), src/v2/sequencer.ts (Dawn p.handLimit), src/v2/combat.ts (combatPenalty in getPlayerPowerAtNode), src/v2/actions.ts (executeRecruit/executeParley/parleyTarget), src/v2/commands.ts ('PARLEY'), src/v2/ai-player.ts (heraldAffinity/parleyBias steps), src/v2/sim/{metrics,report}.ts (herald metrics + stance parity), scripts/tune-herald.mjs

LOCKED tunables (R3): FORGE_TOLL_COST=1, SEALED_CORE_PLEDGE='gambit_claimant', GAMBIT_SELF_COVER_CARDS=4, DOOM_COST_PER_PLAYER=5, SPREAD_AMOUNT_BASE=7, HERALD_HAND_BONUS=1 (HERALD_COMBAT_PENALTY=1, HERALD_PUSHBACK=1, HERALD_RECRUIT_COST=2)

sim-results/s20260622-n40/REPORT.md (latest LOCKED competitive: SK-win 20.0%, gambit-noG 17.0%, oaths 6.13/3.46, tolls 0.89, heralds 1.78/59% political); PRIOR docs DESIGN-V2-OATHS / RESCUE-ECONOMY / DARK-ENGAGEMENT / FOCUS-GROUP-R2/R3 / ALGORITHM §9.1
invariants: All mutation goes through applyCommand (src/v2/reducer.ts) — no direct state mutation elsewhere
No Math.random / Date.now / any in src/v2 — all RNG via SeededRandom (ALGORITHM §7)
AI decisions must be pure f(state, seed) (ALGORITHM §7.9) — required for reproducibility

Layer B (blood_pact) only: pledges emit PLEDGE_COMMITTED (concealed) not PLEDGE_SUBMITTED; real tiers go to suspicionLog; the traitor forfeits the doom_complete win iff bloodPactExposed. Competitive mode behavior is unchanged.
gotchas: `npm test` includes ~50 RED v1 tests by design (they anchor v1) — use `npm run test:v2` for the v2 suite
vitest output buffers when piped through `tail` — redirect to a file, or use the JSON reporter (verify.mjs does)
Run `npm run verify` to (re)populate this block; never hand-edit lastVerified/dirty

ACTION pointer quirk: after the LAST player in turnOrder exhausts actions, advanceActivePlayer leaves activePlayerIndex ON that player (turnOrderPosition === turnOrder.length). Any per-player action loop must ALSO stop on actionsRemaining===0, not just the index — else it re-enters a 0-action player (runAITurn handles this).

The v2 UI lives in src/ui-v2 (entry index.html → src/ui-v2/main.ts; old v1 harness preserved at index-v1.html). It is OUTSIDE the verify lint/test scope (src/v2 tests/v2), but tsc --noEmit covers all of src/ so it must typecheck. Validate UI changes with `npm run dev` (or `npx vite build`); the headless session driver has logic coverage in tests/v2/ui-session.test.ts.

BYTE-IDENTICAL SCOPE (post-R3): the determinism guard = (a) same config → identical run + (b) DEFAULT_AI_POLICY-by-reference takes the legacy AI action path. It does NOT mean the baseline game matches the PRE-Stage-5 game — engine tunables (SPREAD_AMOUNT_BASE, LANDED_STRIKE_WOUNDS, FORGE_TOLL_COST, DOOM_COST_*) are retuned LIVE defaults that fire for ALL games incl. all-baseline. No golden-legacy fixture exists; 'neutral value reproduces baseline' comments are scoped to AI POLICY knobs, not engine tunables.
openRisks: POST-R3 REVIEW (2026-06-23, memory iron-ashes-review-findings): code + competitive balance are SOUND (406 tests, 2-seed stable, every mechanic fires, no illegal-AI-action gaps). Fixed in the pre-5e cleanup: the gambit §9 check + tuningLoss now judge the gambler-free number (was the always-FAIL all-matchups one); the rescue §9 band re-stated 2-4 → 0.5-4 (capped, labeled); the oath-while-Broken gap (oaths now dissolve when a member breaks). All four §9 dashboard bands now PASS honestly.

STRUCTURAL CAPS (escalated, accepted): (1) rescues ~0.7 pooled — 2-4 unreachable inside all_broken<5% (tuning-log §5d); alive at 3-4p; the deeper fix (don't-end-on-all-broken / defer broken-lands ash) is available if the user wants it. (2) Per-count ladder NON-MONOTONIC (2p 19.6 / 3p 24.4 / 4p 16.1 — 3p hardest) from the Stage-S DOOM_COST_PER_PLAYER 6→5; §9.1 reframed; a future tune could restore monotonicity.

DESIGN DEBT (for 5f): (a) DESIGN-V2-ALGORITHM.md §§1-11 prose still predates Stage 5 — §12 is the authoritative delta pointer; fold §12 into the prose at 5f. (b) Oath/rescue-debt OVERLAP — R3 wanted Oaths to ABSORB rescue, but both coexist (a rescue auto-swears an oath ON TOP of the rescue-debt); decide merge-or-keep. (c) Sealed-pledge concealment is a SIM NO-OP — the gambit fix is the GAMBIT_SELF_COVER_CARDS gate; the 'volunteer's-dilemma' drama is unvalidated (human-only). (d) Herald is ABSTRACTED (stance flag + Parley, no literal moving piece). (e) 30-45min scope unmeasured after ~2x the per-round verb count.

BLOOD PACT (the 5e job): traitor win 8.8% (target 12-20, UNDER) + exposure 87% (target 40-70, OVER) — traitor under-powered/over-caught; accusation accuracy 54.3% (≥45 OK), 1.6 accusations/game (≤2.5 OK). Fix chooseAccusation heuristic + ACCUSATION knobs (AUDIT_COST, penalties/cooldown, SUSPICION_LOG_ROUNDS, TRAITOR_EXPOSED_WOUNDS).

PLACEHOLDER TUNABLES — RESOLVED in C2 (tuning-log §C2): the 6 never-swept levers (PLEDGE_SHIELD_AMOUNT, PLEDGE_FAVOR_GRUDGE_REDUCTION, DK_MARCH_DISTANCE, SURGE_SPREAD_MULT, GAMBIT_ADJACENT_STRIKE_MULT, RESCUE_DEBT_MIN_PLEDGE) were found UN-INJECTABLE (read as static module imports, absent from the Tunables interface) — a real seam bug, now fixed (added to interface + DEFAULT_TUNABLES; consumers route through getTunables(); defaults byte-identical). FINDING: PLEDGE_SHIELD_AMOUNT is LOAD-BEARING (±1 swings SK-win ±~5.5pp; =1 lands 20.1% in-band) — kept at 1, now a documented first-class dark-strength lever, not a 'reasonable default'. Other 5 wired + confirmed low-impact. STILL un-swept (separate, not part of C2): GAMBIT_SURCHARGE (left 0.25 — sealing fixed the gambit instead), DK_PER_PLAYER parked at 0 (scaling backfires once kills pay).

DATA-TRUST CAVEAT (4g): combat commits are ENGINE-auto (COMBAT_COMMIT_MAX, RAID_DEFENSE_MARGIN), Last Stand engine-auto — good enough for balance signal; a per-policy combat-commit decision is a future improvement.
